commands.review_summary:
The PR pins the iOS release version to 2026.5.25, makes the app, share extension, and live activity widget iPhone-only, removes the iPad orientation override, and updates App Store text and release notes.

PR surface: Docs +2, Other -9. Total -7 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is release/configuration prep rather than a bug report. The relevant behavior is source-verifiable through XcodeGen target-family settings, Info.plist output, and the pinned iOS versioning workflow.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer label plus compatibility-sensitive iOS release/version changes make this a release-owner review item, not an automated fix-PR candidate.

target.title: [codex] Prepare iPhone-only iOS App Store release
target.body:
## Summary

- pins the iOS release train back to the currently public TestFlight version `2026.5.25`
- makes the iOS app, share extension, and live activity widget iPhone-only for App Store submission
- removes the iPad-specific orientation override from the app Info.plist
- updates App Store metadata and iOS release-note source to describe the first iPhone release

## App Store Connect

- uploaded metadata for draft App Store version `2026.5.28`
- confirmed age rating is set to `FOUR_PLUS`
- confirmed content rights are set to `DOES_NOT_USE_THIRD_PARTY_CONTENT`
- confirmed uploaded metadata no longer mentions iPad

## Verification

- `node --import tsx scripts/ios-sync-versioning.ts --check`
- `plutil -lint apps/ios/Sources/Info.plist`
- `git diff --check`
- `rg -n "iPhone or iPad|iPad|ipad|UISupportedInterfaceOrientations~ipad" apps/ios/project.yml apps/ios/Sources/Info.plist apps/ios/fastlane/metadata/en-US apps/ios/Sources/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/Contents.json` returned no matches
- `pnpm ios:gen`

## Follow-up

A new iPhone-only binary still needs to be uploaded before App Store review can use these target-family changes.
target.author: ngutman
